content.speakerText: I feel like such a failure...
expectedAnswers: I remember how well you handled that big presentation last month. You've got the skills—you're just having a rough moment.
It's okay to feel this way right now. Failure doesn't define you; your effort does.
evaluationCriteria: 是否用共情语言回应，而非否定或轻视情绪
是否使用了具体回忆或事实增强对方信心
是否避免使用空泛安慰（如‘别担心’）或指责性语言（如‘你该更努力’）

content.speakerText: I just can't handle this stress anymore.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的受不了这种压力了。
expectedAnswers: I'm here for you—this sounds really overwhelming.
It makes sense that you're feeling this way after everything you've been juggling.
You don't have to go through this alone. Would you like to talk about what's weighing on you most?
evaluationCriteria: 是否准确识别并命名对方的情绪（如 overwhelming, stressed）
是否表达支持性陪伴（如 I'm here for you, you're not alone）
是否避免立即给出解决方案，而是先确认情绪
